briefdescription.para: External crystal oscillator divided to 1 kHz.
External clock input from Gclk I/O pin.
division ratio of mclk prescaler for CPU

detaileddescription.para: Used for setting a clock rate

briefdescription.para: Clock control header file for Microchip pic32cz_ca family.

detaileddescription.para: This file provides clock driver interface definitions and structures for pic32cz_ca family
